title: QA Failure Density Enumeration PASS — recasts cert [194] cognition-space morphospace ratios in Kochenderfer Ch. 7 vocabulary as exact mod-9 enumeration with zero variance, head-to-head with Kochenderfer Algorithm 7.1 direct sampling at N in {100, 1000, 10000} per (Kochenderfer, 2026)
_fixture_purpose: Primary PASS fixture for cert [263]. Reproduces cert [194] qa_cognition_space_morphospace_cert_v1 (Sole, 2026; arxiv:2601.12837) ratios |reachable_set|/|S_9| in {1/81, 8/81, 72/81} via the mod-9 orbit-class enumeration utility tools/qa_kg/orbit_failure_enumeration.py, then runs Kochenderfer-style direct sampling at three N levels per orbit class with seed=42. Validator gates: FDE_1 / FDE_RATIO / FDE_SAMPLING / FDE_STDERR / FDE_UTIL / FDE_SRC / FDE_WIT / FDE_F.
source_attribution: Anchored at cert [194] qa_cognition_space_morphospace_cert_v1 (Dale, 2026; Sole, 2026; arxiv:2601.12837). Recast in (Kochenderfer, 2026) Algorithms for Validation Ch. 7 vocabulary: Kochenderfer Ch. 7 §7.1 direct estimation p_fail = E[1{tau not in psi}] = integral 1{tau not in psi} p(tau) d tau specializes to exact finite enumeration on QA mod-9 orbit graph; sigma_hat = sqrt(p (1 - p) / N) per Kochenderfer eq. 7.3. Bridge spec: docs/specs/QA_KOCHENDERFER_BRIDGE.md §3. Verbatim anchor: docs/theory/kochenderfer_validation_excerpts.md#val-7-1-direct-estimation-pfail. Authored Will Dale + Claude 2026-04-27.

exact_enumeration.method: exhaustive enumeration over (b, e) in {1..9} x {1..9}; classifier from cert [194] orbit_family_s9 (singularity = (9,9); satellite = b mod 3 = 0 AND e mod 3 = 0 AND not singularity; cosmos otherwise). Returns Fractions; no float in QA state path.

claim: For QA reachability specifications on the finite mod-9 orbit graph, Kochenderfer Ch. 7 failure-probability estimation specializes to exact enumeration with zero variance. Cert [194]'s ratios 1/81, 8/81, 72/81 are reproduced bit-exact by the mod-9 orbit-class enumeration; Kochenderfer's direct-sampling estimator (Algorithm 7.1) at N in {100, 1000, 10000} per class produces estimates within the |error| <= 4 * sigma envelope predicted by Kochenderfer eq. 7.3 sigma_hat = sqrt(p (1 - p) / N).
claim_scope: This cert does not prove that QA enumeration is novel as probability theory; it proves that an existing QA reachability cert ([194]) can be re-expressed in Kochenderfer's validation vocabulary and gains an exact finite-state estimator with zero sampling variance, while the corresponding direct estimator exhibits the expected Bernoulli sampling error.

witnesses.kochenderfer_role: rare-event target — N >= 1000 needed for 4-sigma envelope to fall under p_true
mid-rare event — illustrates Bernoulli p(1-p)/N decay clearly across N
majority event — sampling concentrates fast; smallest 4-sigma envelope per N

cross_references.name: QA Bateson Learning Levels Cert
cross_references.relation: candidate consumer of orbit_failure_enumeration utility for tiered-reachability ratios

cross_references.name: QA Levin Cognitive Lightcone Cert
cross_references.relation: candidate consumer for orbit-radius / agency ratios on cancer / Cosmos transitions
